title: Plasti-Kote The Perfect Finish Leaf Spray, 400 ml, Silver
features: High performance for the home or tradesman
Package Dimensions: 7.0 L x 9.0 H x 7.0 W (centimetres)
description: Plasti-kote PKT27111 Details Plasti-Kote Leaf Spray is a decorative, quick-drying acrylic lacquer that creates a gold leaf or silver leaf effect. It has a noble metal appearance with high gloss finish that is resistant to abrasions. Making it especially suitable for outdoors. For use on metal, glass, ceramics, stone, wood, paper, carton and many other surfaces. Optimal gloss will be achieved on a white base coat. Possible applications: picture/mirror frames, furniture, borders/ornamental battens, signs, Christmas and other decorations, etc. We recommend to prime with Plasti-Kote Twist & Spray white primer. The product can also be used underneath Plasti-Kote Chalk Sprays to create a classic looking piece of furniture. 1 x Plasti-Kote Leaf Spray Silver 400ml
